data.title: Wirtz Center original play ‘Amicus’ follows university students through love, war
data.description: “Amicus,” an original play written by Communication senior Max Outcalt, premiered Friday and Saturday.  Outcalt wrote “Amicus” in a theatre department playwriting class nearly two years ago. Last spring, he applied for the Wirtz Center’s Student Performance Projects, which allows students to submit their works to be performed in Wirtz throughout the year.
